name: CEVA INC
summary: CEVA Inc. is a silicon and software intellectual property (IP) licensing company enabling Physical AI across connect, sense, and infer layers. It licenses processor IP, wireless connectivity platforms (Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, UWB, 5G, cellular IoT), AI/ML inference engines, and sensor fusion software to semiconductor and OEM customers for integration into ASICs, ASSPs, and SoCs. CEVA's IP is embedded in approximately 2 billion devices annually, with over 20 billion cumulative units shipped since 2003.

products.name: Ceva Waves Bluetooth
products.description: Hardware IP and software stacks supporting Bluetooth and 802.15.4 standards for TWS earbuds, wearables, toys, and smart home devices.

products.name: Ceva Waves Wi-Fi
products.description: Scalable subsystems supporting Wi-Fi 4 through Wi-Fi 7 for high-performance and low-power embedded designs.

products.name: Ceva Waves UWB
products.description: MAC/PHY IP enabling precise ranging, secure localization, indoor navigation, and Doppler-based presence detection.

products.name: Ceva Waves Links
products.description: Integrated multi-radio platforms with coexistence algorithms for Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, UWB on shared RF frontends.

products.name: Ceva Waves DragonFly
products.description: Turnkey NB-IoT modem platforms with GNSS support for smart metering, asset tracking, and industrial IoT.

products.name: CevaXC20
products.description: DSP supporting 5G/5G-Advanced baseband for mobile broadband, RedCap, and IoT devices.

products.name: PentaG2
products.description: Platform supporting 5G/5G-Advanced baseband processing for user equipment.

products.name: PentaGRAN
products.description: Carrier-grade Layer 1 PHY processing platform for small cells, Open RAN, private networks, and satellite communications.

partnerships.description: CEVA was formed from the combination of DSP Group's DSP IP licensing division and Parthus Technologies in November 2002.
Merged with DSP Group's IP division in November 2002 to form CEVA as a dedicated pure-play IP licensing company.
